summary: Frontend testing complete for theme appearance system update. All 6 features tested and working correctly: Sidebar background color changes when switching themes (Light/Dark/Blue/Green/Red), user's sidebar accent color is preserved when changing themes, sidebar has good contrast in all themes (white text on dark backgrounds), theme change persists after page reload, mobile header adapts to theme colors via CSS variables, and works in both light mode themes and dark mode theme.

sidebar_background_changes_with_themes.description: Sidebar background color changes when switching themes

verified_colors.dark-default: rgb(15, 23, 41) - dark blue sidebar with dark body

sidebar_accent_color_preserved.description: User's sidebar accent color (active item) is preserved when changing themes
sidebar_accent_color_preserved.verified: Accent color stayed consistent (#ffffff or user-selected color) across all theme switches
sidebar_accent_color_preserved.implementation: setThemePreset() in ThemeContext.jsx preserves sidebarAccentColor when switching themes

sidebar_contrast.description: Sidebar has good contrast in all themes (text readable)
sidebar_contrast.verified: White text (#f8fafc) on dark backgrounds provides excellent contrast in all themes

theme_persistence_after_reload.description: Theme change persists after page reload

mobile_header_adapts.description: Mobile header adapts to theme colors via CSS variables
mobile_header_adapts.implementation: Mobile header uses hsl(var(--sidebar-bg)) for background

light_and_dark_mode.description: Works in both light mode themes and dark mode theme
light_and_dark_mode.verified: Dark theme applies body class 'dark-theme', light themes apply 'light-theme'

css_variables: --sidebar-active-text: Color for active nav item text

critical_code_review_comments: THEME_PRESETS correctly defines sidebar colors for each theme
setThemePreset() correctly preserves user's sidebarAccentColor when switching themes
applyTheme() correctly sets all sidebar CSS variables based on theme preset
Sidebar.jsx correctly uses inline styles with CSS variables for theme-aware styling
Mobile header correctly uses hsl(var(--sidebar-bg)) for background color
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme appearance system fully tested. 5 theme presets available in Settings > Tema tab: Claro (Padrão), Escuro (Padrão), Azul, Verde, Vermelho. Each theme defines sidebar background color via CSS variables. User's sidebar accent color (set in Club > Settings) is preserved when switching themes. Theme persists in localStorage. All features working correctly.
